name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Restarted
notes: This Building Block defines virtual machine restart events.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Restarted on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Virtual Machine Restart Attempt, Audit.Virtual Machine Restart Success
